channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: ASIO warns MPs over discussing sensitive information in connected cars
item.description: Australia’s domestic intelligence agency, ASIO, has issued a security warning to politicians and public servants, advising them against discussing sensitive or classified matters inside vehicles. The ...

item.title: Canada advances negotiations with Saab for early-warning aircraft as defence procurement strategy shifts
item.description: Canada is moving forward in negotiations with Swedish defence company Saab to acquire its GlobalEye airborne early-warning and control system, marking a significant step in Ottawa’s efforts to reduce ...

item.title: Concerns raised over £1bn cost of proposed Net Zero energy infrastructure incentives
item.description: The article reports growing political and industry criticism of a proposed energy policy linked to UK Energy Secretary Ed Miliband’s Net Zero strategy. The plan includes introducing financial incentiv...

item.title: Trump Endorsement of Paxton Raises Financial and Electoral Concerns for GOP in Texas Senate Race
item.description: Ken Paxton’s surprise primary win over Senator John Cornyn in Texas has alarmed Republican strategists and donors, who fear the ensuing general election could demand unprecedented financial resources....

item.title: Carroll Baker’s Role as Jean Harlow in the 1965 Biopic and Its Cinematic Impact
item.description: Carroll Baker's portrayal of Jean Harlow in the 1965 Paramount biopic 'Harlow' showcased her glamour and screen presence, though the film was widely criticized for historical inaccuracies. Originally,...

item.title: Momentum Health appointed as administrator for Bonitas Medical Fund from June
item.description: South Africa’s private healthcare sector is set for a notable transition as Bonitas Medical Fund officially hands over its administration to Momentum Health from June. The move follows growing scrutin...

item.title: Pakistan praised for diplomatic mediation role in US-Iran tensions
item.description: Pakistan has been highlighted in international media for its quiet but effective diplomatic role in easing tensions between the United States and Iran. According to a report referenced by Turkish broa...

item.title: India and China Review Border Stability in Constructive Talks on LAC in Beijing
item.description: India and China have held fresh diplomatic discussions focusing on the situation along the Line of Actual Control (LAC), describing the engagement as “constructive” and “forward-looking”. The talks to...

item.title: Ken Paxton Defeats Senator John Cornyn in Texas Republican Primary Runoff
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated longtime U.S. Senator John Cornyn in a closely watched Republican primary runoff, marking a significant shift within the state’s GOP and highlighting the con...

item.title: UDSM to Host 17th Julius Nyerere International Festival Focusing on Pan-African Dialogue
item.description: The University of Dar es Salaam (UDSM) is gearing up to host the 17th Julius Nyerere International Festival from May 28–30, 2026 at the New Library Conference Auditorium on the Mlimani Campus. The fes...

item.title: Ten People Have Died in Water-Related Incidents Amid UK Heatwave
item.description: During the recent UK heatwave, a teenage boy has tragically become the tenth person to die in water-related incidents. His body was recovered from a pond in Swanscombe, Kent, after concerns were raise...

item.title: Otubanjo Says Fubara May Defect To NDC Ahead Of 2027 Elections
item.description: Femi Otubanjo, wey be director of research for the Nigerian Institute of International Affairs, don talk say Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara fit move go the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) b...

item.title: US fugitive arrested in Gqeberha over alleged child sexual assault cases in Texas
item.description: Police in Gqeberha have arrested a 56-year-old American citizen, Robert Lee Redd Jr, who is wanted in the United States in connection with serious sexual assault allegations involving two minors in Te...

item.title: Vertu launches $6,880 AI-powered foldable smartphone targeting enterprise executives
item.description: Luxury smartphone maker Vertu has unveiled a new foldable device designed specifically for business executives who manage operations on the move. The device, called Alphafold, starts at $6,880 for its...

item.title: Environmental concerns over major infrastructure projects in the Philippines, from Boracay bridge to Quirino Avenue tree cutting
item.description: This opinion article discusses growing concerns over how infrastructure development in the Philippines is being carried out at the expense of environmental protection. It highlights two major examples...

item.title: Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz underwent surgery at Lahore hospital, confirms minister
item.description: Punjab Chief Minister Maryam Nawaz has undergone a major surgical procedure at Sharif Medical City Hospital in Lahore, according to senior provincial minister Marriyum Aurangzeb. In a statement shared...

item.title: Haifa Port Emerges as a Strategic Trade and Connectivity Hub for India in West Asia
item.description: The article explains the growing importance of Israel’s Haifa Port in India’s economic and strategic planning in West Asia. Located on Israel’s northern coast, Haifa Port is one of the country’s bigge...

item.title: Legal experts say Ramaphosa’s Phala Phala review application has merit amid impeachment scrutiny
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa’s legal challenge to the independent panel report on the Phala Phala matter has been assessed by legal analysts, who say the application appears to have merit. The review app...

item.title: Tanzania Hosts Impact Investment Forum Showcasing Startups and Growth Opportunities
item.description: The Tanzania Impact Investment Forum (TIIF) 2026 is set for 1st–3rd June at Johari Rotana Hotel in Dar es Salaam, bringing together investors, high-impact SMEs, policymakers, and development partners ...

item.title: Nigerian man prefers cash to dinner with Davido, sparking online debate
item.description: A Nigerian man sparked a lively online debate after saying he would take 22 million Kenyan shillings in cash rather than dine with Afrobeats star Davido. He questioned the value of a dinner with the m...
